description: Legal query draft regarding a man who willed his executor to buy landed property worth 500 dinars, the proceeds of which were to be divided equally between the poor of his town and the family of his paternal uncle. Question: have the great-grandchildren of that paternal uncle rights on the will? It is unclear if this was written before or after the letter from 1208 on recto. (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, p. 436, and Goitein's note card.)
description_he: טיוטת שאלה משפטית בדבר איש שהצווה לאפוטרופוס לקנות קרקע ב-500 דינרים, שרווחיה יחולקו בין עניי עירו ומשפחת דודו. שאלה: האם לנכדי הנכדים של הדוד זכות על הצוואה?
